name: Blood and Jungle
description: A comprehensive module covering the Pacific Theater, featuring 16 scenarios across diverse terrain from jungles to atolls. Includes detailed historical notes and custom counters.

name: Into the Rubble
description: Urban warfare at its finest. 12 scenarios depicting city fighting from Stalingrad to Berlin. Includes overlays and special rules for multi-story buildings.

name: Counterattack!
description: Fast-paced armor engagements across the Eastern Front. 10 scenarios featuring tank battles from 1941-1945. Perfect for armor enthusiasts.

name: High Ground 2
description: The sequel to our popular mountain warfare module. 14 scenarios across alpine terrain from Italy to Norway. Includes elevation overlays.

name: Operation Cobra
description: Breakout from Normandy! 8 linked scenarios covering the decisive American offensive. Can be played as a mini-campaign.

name: Elite Forces Pack
description: Premium counter set featuring elite units from all nations. Includes SS, Guards, Marines, Paratroopers, and Commandos. 280 die-cut counters.

name: Vehicle Arsenal
description: Expanded vehicle counter set with rare and prototype vehicles. 350 die-cut counters covering 1939-1945.

name: Deluxe Map Set A
description: Four oversized geomorphic maps printed on heavy cardstock. Features varied terrain including villages, woods, and rivers. Compatible with all ASL™ products.

name: Urban Combat Maps
description: Three specialized maps for city fighting. Dense urban terrain with multi-story buildings, rubble, and streets. Heavy duty construction.

name: Pacific Theater Maps
description: Specialized maps for jungle and island warfare. Two maps featuring dense vegetation, beaches, and villages. Premium quality.

name: Winter Warfare
description: Battle in the snow! 11 scenarios covering winter combat from Finland to the Eastern Front. Includes winter rules and overlays.

name: Desert Rats
description: North Africa campaign module. 13 scenarios depicting battles in the desert from 1940-1943. Includes special terrain and rules.
